MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT JACK HO's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT as follows: Defendant Jack Ho's motion to strike punitive damages allegations in the first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed order the repeats verbatin the court's ruling. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
